title: Hideaki Anno Neon Genesis Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Hideaki Anno: "Neon Genesis Evangelion"             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Dec 26, 2009 1:08 pm

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Dec 26, 2009 1:12 pm Yes he does.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sat Dec 26, 2009 1:30 pm Absolutely.

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Sat Dec 26, 2009 2:07 pm Anno's a troll?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Dec 26, 2009 2:17 pm Synapsid: I think the joke is more that he causes people heated arguments and such (see also various threads on the forums). Funny stuff at any rate.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Dec 26, 2009 2:24 pm Synapsid wrote: Anno's a troll?

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Sat Dec 26, 2009 2:32 pm Basically.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Dec 26, 2009 2:46 pm I think that would be more contemporary if it was "second half of 2.0" instead of simply NGE oh wait... but yeah, Anno = troll

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sat Dec 26, 2009 2:52 pm Only the second half? This is the portion of the esselpost where you pretend I put together some sort of Photoshop or elaborate pun comparing Rebuild to both Avatar and Alvin and the Chipmunks: The Squeakquel , and either applaud or ban accordingly.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Dec 26, 2009 2:56 pm I'm sure this has been done before regarding 2.0: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sat Dec 26, 2009 3:01 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: I'm sure this has been done before regarding 2.0: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Dec 26, 2009 3:04 pm Typo.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sat Dec 26, 2009 3:10 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Typo.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sat Dec 26, 2009 3:22 pm pretty funny, old but pretty funny.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Sat Dec 26, 2009 4:33 pm this brightened up my dreary day.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Dec 26, 2009 5:47 pm esselfortium wrote: Joseph the PRPD wrote: Typo.
